title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 8.851 - Quality of indoor air not to be sacrificed for increased energy efficiency
text:
8.851.  Quality of indoor air not to be sacrificed for increased energy efficiency. — No provision of sections 8.830 to 8.851 or any rule promulgated thereunder shall sacrifice the quality of indoor air in the pursuit of increased energy efficiency.
(L. 1993 S.B. 80, et al. § 13)
